summary: TypeScript code is well-structured with proper types and error handling, but the deliverable is critically incomplete. Missing: (1) all test files—bun test step exists but no .test.ts files provided; (2) test harness required by task (must call act push per test case, capture to act-result.txt, validate exit codes & exact output); (3) fixture files referenced in workflow (fixtures/files.json, rules.json); (4) act-result.txt generation—required artifact never created; (5) no evidence TDD methodology was followed (should show failing test → minimal code → refactor). Workflow itself (lines 1–50) is reasonable but architecturally incomplete: it runs bun test with no tests, assigns labels, but provides no test oracle or validation harness. Does not ship.
